zh.Plumpton In Spofforth, Yorkshire, Englan: 英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Plumpton於1408年出生在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯時，她的父親William Plumpton8歲，母親Alice Foljambe22歲。她於1427年與Randolph Pigot在英國越可爾普倫普頓 在 斯波福斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1502年在英國越可爾享年94歲。

nameMeanings.name: Plumpton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of several places called with Old English plūme, plȳme ‘plum, plum tree’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, including Plumpton (Yorkshire, Northamptonshire, Sussex, Cumbria), Fieldplumpton or Woodplumpton (Lancashire), Plympton (Devon), and a lost Plumpton in Kingsbury (Warwicks).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Plumpton was born in 1408, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England, her father, William Plumpton, was 8 and her mother, Alice Foljambe, was 22. She married Randolph Pigot in 1427, in Plumpton in Spofforth, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1502, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 94.

Elle a épousé Randolph Pigot en 1427, à Plumpton in Spofforth, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1502, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 94 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Plumptonが1408年にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースで生まれた時，父William Plumptonは8歳，母Alice Foljambeは22歳であった。1427年にイギリスヨークシュアイアプルンプトン イン スプオフォースでRandolph Pigotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1502年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで94歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Plumpton(이)가 1408년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Plumpton(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Foljambe(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1427년 영국 요르크실르 플럼프턴 인 스포포스에서 Randolph Pigot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 영국 요르크실르에서 94세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Plumpton родилась в 1408 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Plumpton было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Foljambe, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Randolph Pigot в 1427 г. в местности плумптон ин споффорт, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1502 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 94 лет.
